name: ALERT - Weather Backend Delivery
description: Phase 10.3L4 thin Telegram delivery workflow. Backend/Supabase evaluator owns weather alert rules, cooldowns, quiet hours, and history.

parameters.content: Phase 10.3L4. Backend-driven weather alert delivery only. Do not add Google Sheets reads/writes, n8n cooldown rules, or delivery of BACKEND_AUDIT_TEST/details.test alerts. Keep inactive until manual dry-run and audit-test checks pass.
